sub_frustration_kind_tactical_swap: A tactical swap left him unhappy with how he was used.
new_signing_threat_same_position: The new arrival plays in his exact position.
new_signing_threat_similar_status: The signing was bought with a similar squad-status tier in mind.
new_signing_threat_higher_ability: The new arrival has visibly higher ability.
new_signing_threat_larger_wage: The newcomer is on a much larger wage deal.
new_signing_threat_younger: A much younger rival has arrived in his position.
new_signing_threat_already_fringe: He was already short on minutes before the signing arrived.
private_talk_trust_mid: His relationship with the manager is steady but tense.
private_talk_trust_high: Manager trust is high — he expects a fair hearing.
private_talk_repeat_note: He has already raised this with the manager recently.
club_direction_net_signings_strong: The board has clearly backed this transfer window.
club_direction_net_signings_negative: More senior players have left than arrived this window.
club_direction_net_signings_flat: The window has been quiet, neither strengthened nor weakened.
big_match_amplifier_hot_form_dropped: He was hooked despite a hot recent run of form.
big_match_amplifier_young_or_fringe: A fringe / young player getting the nod feels the trust more.
sub_frustration_repeat_note: He has been hooked early repeatedly in recent weeks.
